# Prerelease Gate — 2026-07-21

- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-brain

- Gate: blocked

| Check | Result | Detail |

| Security | PASS | govulncheck green at HEAD; GitHub vulnerability alerts disabled on the repo (no open alerts possible) |

## Findings
- [ ] **[BLOCK][Distribution] Homebrew Formula upload still disabled**
  - **Status quo:** `.goreleaser.yml` `brews[0]` has `skip_upload: true`; commit 88d347c introduced it "until tap token is provisioned". The `HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN` repository secret now exists (provisioned 2026-07-21T18:48:10Z) and `release.yml` passes it to GoReleaser. Target directory `Formula` exists in `danieljustus/homebrew-tap`.
  - **Likely cause:** The temporary skip was not reverted after the token was provisioned.
  - **Proposed solution:** Remove the `skip_upload: true` line from `.goreleaser.yml` and commit; the next tag will then publish `Formula/symbrain.rb` to the tap. A GUI Cask is not expected (apps are build-from-source, not referenced in install docs).
  - **Handoff:** remove the line, then `/commit` (default mode re-verifies CI)

- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Overall coverage 72.3% below the default 80% bar**
  - **Status quo:** `go tool cover` total 72.3%; lowest: `internal/xdg` 0.0%, `internal/skills` 75.7%. No repo hard gate, so this does not block. Regression delta vs v0.1.0: +0.0.
  - **Likely cause:** No enforced threshold; feature-velocity growth.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add unit tests for `internal/xdg` path resolution and error branches in `internal/skills`/`internal/sync`.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage .github/coverage/2026-07-21T19:55:28Z.md` → `/03-gh-go`

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `README.md:17` status block "pre-release, in active development toward `v0.1.0` … before the first tagged release" → "`v0.1.0` released, in active development … before `v1.0.0`"
- `README.md:55` quickstart intro "Build from source (no tagged release yet …)" → "Install the latest release or build from source …"
- `README.md:233` building section "There is no tagged release yet." → added GitHub Release download instructions
- `project.yml:64,109` `MARKETING_VERSION: "0.1.0"` → `"0.2.0"` (both app targets; first shipped app version rides with v0.2.0)
